title: Bhagavad Gita 6.5-7: The Self Is the Friend of the Self
description: The self must be raised by the self; the self is the friend of the self, and the self is the enemy of the self.
introduction: The self must be raised by the self; the self is the friend of the self, and the self is the enemy of the self.

translation.text: One must elevate oneself by one's own mind, not degrade oneself. The mind alone is the friend of the self, and the mind alone is the enemy.
